source_pr.title: executor: speedup unit test
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Try to speed up the unit test. 

Split executor unit test.

before
```go
[2019-07-12T12:55:47.219Z] + go test -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 10m -race -count 1 github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor
[2019-07-12T12:58:53.649Z] ok  	github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor	149.013s
```

This PR
```go
[2019-07-12T12:50:21.176Z] + go test -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 10m -race -count 1 github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor
[2019-07-12T12:52:12.579Z] ok  	github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor	104.146s
```

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - No code

Code changes

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: executor: speedup unit test.
